analysis:
【今日摘要】
今日市場情緒熱烈，受美國與伊朗達成協議影響，道瓊指數創下新高的內盤和收盤紀錄。科技股表現突出，Nvidia、Micron、SanDisk和SpaceX等公司股價大幅上漲。英特爾再次成為投資者關注的焦點，與此同時，投資者對於圖形處理單元（GPU）的重要性也有所轉變。另外，Roku被福斯收購22億美元引發大疑問，美國股市大幅下跌，納斯達克指數領跌。

【結語】
今日市場情緒熱烈，但投資者應該保持冷靜。投資者應該考慮到未來可能出現的健康問題，如何籌措相關的醫療費用，避免因為醫療費用而影響退休生活的穩定。另外，投資者應該小心提高信貸限額，避免過度消費。最後，投資者應該保持耐心，等待人工智慧帶動整體市場。

【精選個股】
PLAY - Dave & Buster's Entertainment, Inc. - 公司將在 2026 年財年內達成超過 10 億美元的自由現金流量，並維持資產固定支出的控制在 20 億美元以下。
LUMN - Lumen - 公司的企業導向文藝復興和高前景自由現金流收益率，表明公司的財務穩定和投資潛力。
RKT - Roku - 公司與福斯達成22億美元收購協議，股價大幅上升至四年新高。風險提醒：投資者應該小心提高信貸限額，避免過度消費。

items.title: Why Palantir Stock Soared Today
items.summary: Palantir stock jumped in a bullish day for the broader market, but it's still down 35% from its peak.
items.zh_title: 為什麼Palantir股價今天大幅上漲
items.zh_point: Palantir 股價在整體市場的強勁行情下大幅上漲，但仍遠離其峰值，股價下跌了 35%。

items.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump, Iran Deal Spark Stock Market Surge; Nvidia, Micron, Sandisk, SpaceX Are Big Winners
items.summary: Dow Jones Futures: Trump's U.S.-Iran deal sparked a big stock market rally Monday. Nvidia, Micron, Sandisk and SpaceX were big winners.
items.zh_title: 道瓊未來指數：川普與伊朗協議引發股市大幅上漲；Nvidia、Micron、SanDisk、SpaceX是大贏家
items.zh_point: 川普與伊朗達成協議，美國股市大幅上漲，Nvidia、Micron、SanDisk和SpaceX等科技股表現突出。

items.title: Intel gets a $170 billion AI reason to matter again
items.summary: For much of the artificial intelligence boom, investors have heard one simple story. Graphics processing units were at the center of it all. That thesis made Nvidia (NVDA) a must-have in the stock market. It also drove investors to Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), Broadcom (AVGO), Marvell Technology ...
items.zh_title: 英特爾再次成為重點股：1700億美元的AI新機會
items.zh_point: 英特爾在人工智能浪潮中再次成為投資者關注的焦點，與此同時，投資者對於圖形處理單元（GPU）的重要性也有所轉變。

items.title: Intuit Stock's Real Growth Story Isn't The One You're Watching
items.summary: The market is rightly focused on the company's struggles in do-it-yourself tax, but it might be missing a massive and much more lucrative business taking over from within.
items.zh_title: 英特盈股價的真正成長故事不是你正在看的
items.zh_point: 英特盈股價受市場關注的自助稅業務面臨困難，但公司內部另有一個龐大的、更為有利可圖的業務正悄然興起。

items.title: Macerich Announces Pricing of Public Offering of Common Stock
items.summary: SANTA MONICA, Calif., June 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Macerich Company (NYSE: MAC) (the “Company” or “Macerich”) announced today that it has priced an underwritten public offering of 14,000,000 shares of common stock at a price to public of $23.90 per share, all of which are being offered in connection with the forward sale agreements described below. Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC is serving as the lead bookrunner and representative of the underwriters of the offering. Deutsche Bank Securities,
items.zh_title: Macerich 公告公眾發行普通股價格
items.zh_point: Macerich 公告發行 14,000,000 股普通股，發行價格為每股 23.90 美元， Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC 擔任主簽約商和承銷商代表。

items.title: Stock futures are little changed after Dow posts new record close on potential U.S.-Iran deal: Live updates
items.summary: On Monday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average climbed to new intraday and closing records on a potential deal between the U.S. and Iran.
items.zh_title: 美股未見重大變動 美國與伊朗達成協議後道瓊新高收盤
items.zh_point: 道瓊工業平均指數因美國與伊朗達成協議而創下新高的內盤和收盤紀錄。

items.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.summary: Traders' optimism over a potential U.S.-Iran deal lifted the Dow Industrials to an intraday all-time high and closing record. Oil prices also cooled.
items.zh_title: 星期二的大股市新聞：市場下一交易日可能受哪些因素影響
items.zh_point: 美國與伊朗可能達成協議，讓股市上漲，同時石油價格也下跌。

items.title: People in China are watching the World Cup differently this time
items.summary: A 12-hour-plus time difference and various streaming options are influencing how people in China watch the World Cup.
items.zh_title: 中國人觀看世界盃的方式有所不同
items.zh_point: 中國觀眾因時差和多種串流選擇而觀看世界盃的方式有所變化。

items.title: US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes in California; 8-member crew presumed dead
items.summary: A U.S. Air Force B-52 Stratofortress bomber crashed on Monday shortly after takeoff from Edwards Air Force Base.
items.zh_title: 美國空軍B-52轟炸機在加州墜毀；8名機組人員被懷疑遇難
items.zh_point: 美國空軍一架B-52轟炸機於星期一在愛德華茲空軍基地起飛不久後墜毀，機上8名機組人員被懷疑遇難。

items.title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Waiting for AI to lift the whole market
items.summary: China's economy sees a lift from artificial intelligence-related industries, while real estate and domestic demand remain lackluster.
items.zh_title: CNBC的中國連線新聞簡報：等待人工智慧帶動整體市場
items.zh_point: 中國的經濟由人工智慧相關產業帶動，但房地產和內需仍疲弱。

items.title: The biggest risk to your retirement isn’t a market crash — it’s a crisis you probably haven’t planned for
items.summary: Health-related financial risks are the No. 1 threat to retirement security.
items.zh_title: 你的退休生活最大的風險，不是市場崩盤，而是你可能還沒有準備的危機
items.zh_point: 健康相關的財務風險，是退休安全的第一大威脅。退休前，投資者應該考慮到未來可能出現的健康問題，如何籌措相關的醫療費用，避免因為醫療費用而影響退休生活的穩定。

items.title: How to work in retirement without seeing your Social Security checks slashed
items.summary: Claiming benefits before full retirement age while keeping a job can trigger unexpected withholdings — but the money isn’t lost forever.
items.zh_title: 如何在退休後不影響退休金的收入
items.zh_point: 在達到全額退休年齡之前領取退休金並持續工作，可能會導致未預期的扣除，但這筆錢並不會永久喪失。

items.title: Need a credit-score boost? Call your credit-card company and ask for this — but proceed with caution.
items.summary: A credit-limit increase can help strained borrowers improve how their financial picture looks on paper.
items.zh_title: 需要提高信貸評分？打電話給銀行卡公司，問他們這個，但要小心。
items.zh_point: 提高信貸限額可以幫助經濟緊張的借款人改善他們的財務狀況在紙上看起來。提高信貸限額可能會提高信貸評分，但要小心因為這可能會導致過度消費。

items.title: Roku’s sale to Fox for $22 billion raises a big question
items.summary: Roku’s stock is rallying to a four-year high after agreeing to be bought by Fox in a deal valued at $22 billion.
items.zh_title: Roku被福斯收購22億美元引發大疑問
items.zh_point: Roku與福斯達成22億美元收購協議，股價大幅上升至四年新高。

items.title: Here’s when gas prices will come down if the U.S. deal to end the Iran war pans out
items.summary: The average retail gasoline price was just above the psychologically significant $4-per-gallon mark on Monday.
items.zh_title: 伊朗戰爭結束協議通過 美國汽油價格有望下降
items.zh_point: 美國與伊朗達成和平協議，汽油價格有望下降。根據最新數據，美國平均零售汽油價格已經超過四美元一加侖的重要心理門檻，與伊朗和平協議達成後汽油價格有望下降。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大跌　中國DeepSeek事件引發整體AI業績下滑
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商遭遇大幅下跌，其中許多公司跌幅超過10%，Nvidia跌幅達16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約金屬交易所金銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約金屬交易所金價下跌 1.4%，銀價下跌 2.5%，連續兩天金價下跌，連續三天銀價下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 關於中國DeepSeek AI的要點
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，且不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度探索不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，市場的恐慌情緒可能過於誇大。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與電信周報：市場談話
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和電信領域的最新發展，包括市場趨勢、投資機會和產業動態。

items.title: AST SpaceMobile: Beyond Space-Based Connectivity, A Defense Powerhouse In The Making
items.zh_title: AST SpaceMobile：超越太空基礎的連接，防禦強權的崛起
items.zh_point: AST SpaceMobile 正在發展成為一家具備太空基礎連接能力的防禦強權，超越傳統的太空技術。

items.title: Lumen: Enterprise-Focused Renaissance And 15% Forward FCF Yield Serve As Green Flags
items.zh_title: Lumen：企業導向的文藝復興和15%的前景自由現金流收益率作為綠旗
items.zh_point: Lumen的企業導向文藝復興和高前景自由現金流收益率，表明公司的財務穩定和投資潛力。

items.zh_title: Form 144 Enliven Therapeutics For：15 June
